trivia_bullets.text: First printing in Magic 2015 (M15), July 18, 2014. Slivers were redesigned in M14/M15 to grant abilities only to slivers you control (not all slivers including opponents'), a controversial change from Tempest-era slivers. Wizards reverted to partially original templating in 2023 and later sets. [Scryfall, WebSearch via MTGSalvation listing]
EDHREC rank 4,239 — one of the more-played slivers in Commander. Granting deathtouch to the entire hive at {1}{G} is efficient for a two-drop. [Scryfall]

"We attacked with arrows dipped in poison. The slivers that did not die began to change." — Hastric, Thunian scout [Scryfall]. Poison weapons became a vector for sliver evolution, not a defense. Hastric appears only in this flavor text — a vignette-only character.
Illustrated by Dave Kendall, a British illustrator with a recurring presence in darker MTG creature and horror art. [Scryfall]

Community discussions on r/EDH flag Venom Sliver + Striking Sliver as a foundational two-card interaction in Sliver Commander lists — deathtouch + first strike guarantees every combat trade. [WebSearch sentiment]

related_cards.name: Striking Sliver
related_cards.note: first strike for all your slivers; pairs with deathtouch for guaranteed kills

related_cards.name: Sliver Hivelord
related_cards.note: indestructible M15 sliver lord; the tribal centerpiece Venom Sliver supports

related_cards.name: Sliver Overlord
related_cards.note: premier sliver Commander; Venom Sliver is a staple in its 99

related_cards.name: Crystalline Sliver
related_cards.note: classic protection-granting sliver; represents the pre-M14 yours-AND-opponents design era
